final_message:
Both files are done and every constraint verified mechanically.

**`REPORT.md`** — 161 words (≤250); exactly four H2 headings in the required order with no other headings; Overview states `$7,154.44` total revenue and 30 orders; Recommendations has exactly three data-grounded bullets (16 words each, ≤25); none of the forbidden words appear.

**`summary.json`** — exactly the five required keys:
- `total_revenue`: 7154.44
- `orders`: 30
- `median_order_value`: 204.94 (even count of 30 → mean of the two middle order values)
- `top_product_by_revenue`: "Gadget" ($2,392.00, ahead of Widget's $2,118.94)
- `revenue_by_region`: all four regions — North 2176.35, South 1732.48, East 1830.79, West 1414.82

All numbers were computed directly from `data/sales.csv` (30 orders). No git commits were made, and I worked only inside the current directory.
